meta.title: World Protocol Academy | Protocol · Diplomacy · Certification
meta.description: World Protocol Academy is an independent digital academy and professional platform for protocol, diplomacy, institutional communication, certification and AI-supported learning.

topbar.text: independent academy and platform for protocol, diplomacy, security and institutional communication.

hero.eyebrow: Independent digital academy · Professional platform · Global perspective
hero.title: Where protocol meets diplomacy, security and dignity.
hero.lead: World Protocol Academy is an independent digital academy and professional platform focused on protocol, diplomacy, security, institutional communication, professional readiness and AI-supported learning.

about.label: About WPA
about.title: A new standard in protocol education.
about.lead: WPA is designed as a serious hybrid between an academy, certification centre, AI-supported platform and institutional advisory model.

academic.title: Academic depth
academic.text: The platform is supported by books, scientific papers, methodology, bibliography and long-term professional doctrine.

professional.title: Professional relevance
professional.text: Designed for ministries, embassies, protocol services, public institutions, executives and serious professional roles.

digital.title: Digital innovation
digital.text: WPA connects structured learning, AI assistance, verification, translation systems and the future WPA Card layer.

programmes.label: Programmes
programmes.title: Four levels. One coherent WPA academy.
programmes.lead: Programmes are professional non-degree certification pathways with clear progression, assessment and applicable institutional logic.

level1.title: Foundation Certificate Programme
level1.text: For protocol, etiquette, first impression and basic institutional readiness.

level2.title: Professional Certificate Programme
level2.text: For state and diplomatic protocol, official visits, ceremonies and formal communication.

level3.title: Advanced Certificate Programme
level3.text: For complex institutional environments, security-aware readiness and multilateral logic.

level4.title: Trainer / Advisor Programme
level4.text: For future trainers, facilitators, advisors and structured WPA knowledge carriers.

certification.label: Certification
certification.title: Learning with proof, progression and credibility.
certification.lead: WPA certificates are professional certificates from an independent academy. They are not university degrees, but proof of structured professional preparation.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.text: Certification is based on quizzes, tests, scenarios, practical tasks and success thresholds.

verification.title: Verification
verification.text: Future architecture includes serial numbers, QR verification and clear linkage to programme and holder.

clarity.title: Institutional clarity
clarity.text: WPA does not present itself as a state diplomatic academy and does not grant university degrees.

institute.label: WPA Institute
institute.title: Institute for Protocol, Diplomacy, Public Communication & Security Studies.
institute.lead: The institute is the academic and methodological layer of WPA: research, index, governance, publications and institutional framework.

research.title: Research
research.text: Development of protocol, diplomacy, communication and security research lines.

method.title: Methodology
method.text: Clear framework for index, comparison, analysis, transparency and scientific verifiability.

governance.title: Governance
governance.text: Gradual development of rules for transparency, conflict of interest, errata and annual reporting.

ai.label: AI Systems
ai.title: AI as infrastructure for learning, onboarding and support.
ai.lead: WPA uses AI to support students, knowledge verification, protocol scenarios, translation and institutional orientation.

bot.title: Bot-Sande
bot.text: Specialized assistant for protocol, diplomacy, books, papers and WPA knowledge.

desk.title: Student Desk
desk.text: Assistant for enrollment, pricing, programmes, exams, certificates and full process guidance.

translator.title: Multilingual Engine
translator.text: New V2 system with clean JSON dictionaries for Macedonian and English, without mixed language.

publications.label: Publications
publications.title: The intellectual foundation of WPA.
publications.lead: WPA is grounded in books, scientific papers, a doctoral dissertation, bibliography and professional experience.

books.title: Books and handbooks
books.text: Monographs and professional publications in protocol, diplomacy, conferences and modern communication.

papers.title: Scientific papers
papers.text: Research and academic contributions strengthening the intellectual weight of the platform.

bibliography.title: Official bibliography
bibliography.text: Structured public overview of publications, papers, authorship, sources and academic profiles.

cta.title: Building a global academy — with structure, dignity and clear direction.
cta.text: Next step is gradual migration of core pages to V2 architecture: clean dictionaries, stable rendering and no mixed language.

footer.text: Independent digital academy and professional platform for protocol, diplomacy, security, institutional communication and professional readiness.
